SubLayerProcessing.SQLScript:
with NPIKeyRaw AS(
    -- NpiKey1: if gapsincare.providerID = dimProvider.providerID, then evaluate isCurrent provider's dimProvider.NPI against dimProviderNPI.NPI
    -- NpiKey2: if gapsincare.providerID = dimProviderNPI.NPI
    -- NpiKey3: if replace(gold_ma_gapsInCare.providerID,'npi-','') = dimProviderNPI.NPI
    select gic.gapsInCareID, dimprovidernpi1.providerNPIKey as NpiKey1, dimprovidernpi2.providerNPIKey as NpiKey2, dimprovidernpi3.providerNPIKey as NpiKey3
    from gold_ma_gapsincare gic
        left join platinum_dimProvider dimProvider
            on gic.providerID = dimProvider.providerID
            and dimProvider.isCurrent = 1 
        left join platinum_dimprovidernpi dimprovidernpi1
            on dimProvider.npi = dimprovidernpi1.NPI
            and dimProvider.providerKey is not null
        left join platinum_dimprovidernpi dimprovidernpi2
            on gic.providerID = dimprovidernpi2.NPI
            and dimProvider.providerKey is null
        left join platinum_dimprovidernpi dimprovidernpi3
            on replace(lower(gic.providerID),'npi-','') = dimprovidernpi3.NPI
            and dimProvider.providerKey is null
),
SourceRaw AS(
    select distinct gic.gapsInCareID
    ,ifnull(dimQualityYearMonth.qualityYearMonthKey, -1) as qualityYearMonthKey
    ,ifnull(dimMember.memberKey, -1) as memberKey
    ,ifnull(dimQualityMeasure.qualityMeasureKey, -1) as qualityMeasureKey
    ,ifnull(dimQualityEvent.qualityEventKey, -1) as qualityEventKey
    ,gic.numerCnt
    ,gic.denomCnt
    ,ifnull(dimDate1.dateKey, -1) as dateOfServiceDateKey
    ,gic.providerID as gapsEventProviderKey
    ,ifnull(dimProvider.providerKey, -1) as planProviderKey
    ,coalesce(npi.NpiKey1, npi.NpiKey2, npi.NpiKey3, -1) as providerNPIKey 
    ,gic.expectedRate
    ,ifnull(dimDate2.dateKey, -1) as serviceNeededByDateKey
    ,gic.PDC as pdc
    ,gic.lastHBVal
    ,ifnull(dimDate3.dateKey, -1) as lastHBDateKey
    ,gic.lastBPDia
    ,gic.lastBPSys
    ,gic.claimNumber
    ,gic.hbTest   
    from gold_ma_gapsincare gic
        left join platinum_dimQualityYearMonth dimQualityYearMonth
            on gic.yearMonth = concat(dimQualityYearMonth.yearNumber, lpad(dimQualityYearMonth.monthNumber,2,'0'))
        left join platinum_dimMember dimMember
            on gic.planMemberID = dimMember.planMemberID
            and dimMember.isCurrent = 1
        left join platinum_dimQualityMeasure dimQualityMeasure
            on gic.measurecode = dimQualityMeasure.qualityMeasureCode
            and left(gic.yearMonth, 4) = dimQualityMeasure.measureYear
            and gic.measureName = dimQualityMeasure.qualityMeasureName
        left join platinum_dimQualityEvent dimQualityEvent
            on gic.eventName = dimQualityEvent.qualityEventDescription
        left join platinum_dimDate dimDate1
            on gic.dateOfService = dimDate1.date
        left join platinum_dimDate dimDate2
            on gic.serviceNeededByDate = dimDate2.date
        left join platinum_dimDate dimDate3
            on gic.lastHBDate = dimDate3.date
        left join platinum_dimProvider dimProvider
            on gic.providerID = dimProvider.providerID
            and dimProvider.isCurrent = 1
        left join NPIKeyRaw npi
            on gic.gapsInCareID = npi.gapsInCareID
)
select distinct gapsInCareID
    ,qualityYearMonthKey
    ,memberKey
    ,qualityMeasureKey
    ,qualityEventKey
    ,numerCnt
    ,denomCnt
    ,dateOfServiceDateKey
    ,gapsEventProviderKey
    ,planProviderKey
    ,providerNPIKey
    ,expectedRate
    ,serviceNeededByDateKey
    ,pdc
    ,lastHBVal
    ,lastHBDateKey
    ,lastBPDia
    ,lastBPSys
    ,claimNumber
    ,hbTest
    ,sha2(concat_ws('|', qualityYearMonthKey
        ,memberKey
        ,qualityMeasureKey
        ,qualityEventKey
        ,ifnull(numerCnt, '|')
        ,ifnull(denomCnt, '|')
        ,dateOfServiceDateKey
        ,ifnull(gapsEventProviderKey, '|')
        ,planProviderKey
        ,providerNPIKey
        ,ifnull(expectedRate, '|')
        ,serviceNeededByDateKey
        ,ifnull(pdc, '|')
        ,ifnull(lastHBVal, '|')
        ,lastHBDateKey
        ,ifnull(lastBPDia, '|')
        ,ifnull(lastBPSys, '|')
        ,ifnull(claimNumber, '|')
        ,ifnull(hbTest, '|'))
    ,256) as fullRowHash
from SourceRaw
SubLayerProcessing.DupScript:
SELECT gapsInCareID
 FROM tempSQLScript 
 GROUP BY gapsInCareID
 HAVING COUNT(1) > 1
SubLayerProcessing.MergeScript:
MERGE INTO DestinationTable t
USING (SELECT * FROM tempSQLScript) s
    ON s.gapsInCareID = t.gapsInCareID    
WHEN MATCHED
AND s.fullRowHash <> t.fullRowHash
THEN UPDATE SET
     qualityYearMonthKey = s.qualityYearMonthKey
    ,memberKey = s.memberKey
    ,qualityMeasureKey = s.qualityMeasureKey
    ,qualityEventKey = s.qualityEventKey
    ,numerCnt = s.numerCnt
    ,denomCnt = s.denomCnt
    ,dateOfServiceDateKey = s.dateOfServiceDateKey
    ,gapsEventProviderKey = s.gapsEventProviderKey
    ,planProviderKey = s.planProviderKey
    ,providerNPIKey = s.providerNPIKey
    ,expectedRate = s.expectedRate
    ,serviceNeededByDateKey = s.serviceNeededByDateKey
    ,pdc = s.pdc
    ,lastHBVal = s.lastHBVal
    ,lastHBDateKey = s.lastHBDateKey
    ,lastBPDia = s.lastBPDia
    ,lastBPSys = s.lastBPSys
    ,claimNumber = s.claimNumber
    ,hbTest = s.hbTest
    ,fullRowHash = s.fullRowHash
WHEN NOT MATCHED 
THEN INSERT
(
     gapsInCareID
    ,qualityYearMonthKey
    ,memberKey
    ,qualityMeasureKey
    ,qualityEventKey
    ,numerCnt
    ,denomCnt
    ,dateOfServiceDateKey
    ,gapsEventProviderKey
    ,planProviderKey
    ,providerNPIKey
    ,expectedRate
    ,serviceNeededByDateKey
    ,pdc
    ,lastHBVal
    ,lastHBDateKey
    ,lastBPDia
    ,lastBPSys
    ,claimNumber
    ,hbTest
    ,fullRowHash
)
VALUES
(
     s.gapsInCareID
    ,s.qualityYearMonthKey
    ,s.memberKey
    ,s.qualityMeasureKey
    ,s.qualityEventKey
    ,s.numerCnt
    ,s.denomCnt
    ,s.dateOfServiceDateKey
    ,s.gapsEventProviderKey
    ,s.planProviderKey
    ,s.providerNPIKey
    ,s.expectedRate
    ,s.serviceNeededByDateKey
    ,s.pdc
    ,s.lastHBVal
    ,s.lastHBDateKey
    ,s.lastBPDia
    ,s.lastBPSys
    ,s.claimNumber
    ,s.hbTest
    ,s.fullRowHash
)
